seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Surrey Downs and Suttontown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Surrey Downs vs Suttontown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Surrey Downs and Suttontown.
heading: Surrey Downs vs Suttontown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Surrey Downs, South Australia and Suttontown, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surrey Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Suttontown (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Surrey Downs or Suttontown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Surrey Downs has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Suttontown scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Surrey Downs scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Suttontown scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Surrey Downs or Suttontown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surrey Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
